heading: TEXAS FIRST EARLY HIGH SCHOOL COMPLETION PROGRAM
operative_text: The agency, in coordination with the coordinating board, shall establish the Texas First Early High School Completion Program to allow public high school students who demonstrate early readiness for college to graduate early from high school. The purpose of the program, in conjunction with the Texas First Scholarship Program established under Subchapter K-1, Chapter 56, is to promote efficiency in the state public education system and incentivize the enrollment of high performing students at eligible institutions.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: the Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board
has the meaning assigned by Section 61.003
the Texas First Early High School Completion Program established under this section
